blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 8,168 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 60°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
